race.comment: BROCKTON (6) led early and was still in the firing line on the turn last start before tiring to finish fifth over 1609m at Fairgrounds Turf (Turf). Likely to be in the finish in this suitable assignment. GORDITO (9) resumes from a spell of five months. Could only manage to finish fifth at the latest run over 1710m at this track (Turf). Good effort to kick-off last prep when in the money at Laurel over 1710m. Bold showing expected. REBEL PRINCE (11) is yet to break through in six runs but has been thereabouts. Placed two back then was 10 lengths away in fourth over 1106m at Laurel (Dirt) last time. Backmarker who gets home hard. Finds a nice race and can measure up. Something for the Multiples: SAINT SOLOMON (2) ORACLE OF BEAUFORT (13)
